name: MERCANTILE BANK CORP
summary: Mercantile Bank Corporation is a Michigan-based registered bank holding company that owns Mercantile Bank and Eastern Michigan Bank, operating 54 office locations. The banks provide commercial banking services to small- and medium-sized businesses, retail banking, and accept checking, savings, and time deposits. Subsidiary Mercantile Insurance Center offers insurance products, and Mercantile Community Partners invests in community development tax credit investments.
